完全新手一問
啱啱試咗一堂免費試堂，俾個教練係咁話我動作唔啱發錯力，例如推胸嘅時候成日用錯咗膊頭/手，跟住佢撳住我個膊頭之後發覺真係做錯左，又或者做拉機嘅時候根本冇用到背肌
究竟我呢d用錯肌肉嘅錯誤可唔可以憑自己糾正到？定係PT錢唔慳得？
可以靠自己糾正到。
最驚係唔知自己錯，知道有錯就得
以推胸為例，其實佢俾我試左兩次，我做完第一次之後佢就已經話我個胸其實冇收縮到，咁我第二次已經特別注意用個胸去做，咁我以為自己有改善到啦，佢就叫我再做第三次，但係今次佢就撳實左我膊頭，咁我再做嘅時候發現難左好多，先發覺原來自己第二次其實都係有用到膊頭力

所以我就唔知，究竟自己單單憑着知道自己有錯係咪可以解決到用錯力嘅問題

侍應端上一客巨型美國炭燒西冷漢堡，我問：「現在已是10時半，還未吃晚餐嗎？」他說：「剛跟同事吃過日式放題，但現在有點餓。」看來，我要立即矯正他對肌肉的誤解：「首先，你用負重運動，如仰臥起坐或器械去鍛鍊腹肌是正確的，因為阻力運動可以令肌肉纖維增加，肌肉便會變大，你這麼努力，8件腹肌該已練成，問題是，它們正埋藏於深處。」表弟問：「表姐，可否說得清楚一點。」我補充：「簡單來說，你看！你那個小肚腩已牢牢地將肌肉蓋住，怎能看得見呢！其實，肌肉跟脂肪是兩種完全不同的組織，絕不能互換的，要看到腹肌，必須做帶氧運動先減掉肚腩的脂肪，所以你還是多跑步，首先減掉脂肪，藏在脂肪後的肌肉才會活現眼前。」

他續問：「為何你阻止我買蛋白粉呢？蛋白質不足，身體也該製造不成肌肉吧！」我指著他面前的西冷：「就連消夜也吃這麼多肉，我認為你攝取的蛋白質量應該過多吧！以成年人計算，每公斤體重大約需要0.8克蛋白質，而每一両肉就已提供約7克蛋白質！攝取過多蛋白質，身體會以脂肪形式儲存，非以肌肉的型態保存在體內呢！」

老弟按一按自己的肚皮說：「怪不得練來練去只練到一嚿腹肌！」我笑言：「你真的以為那一團真是腹肌嗎？」「只是說笑吧！幽默一點可以嗎？據說，多說笑也有助減磅。」真沒好氣！

黎黎去去都係個幾味
早餐同午餐都係朝早一鍋熟
早： 100g金菇+170g硬豆腐+120g蜆肉+40g大燕麥
加餐：10粒純杏仁
午餐：早餐一樣
加餐：10粒純杏仁
gym後：1scoop pea protein isolate
晚餐：一碗白飯+大量菜+一隻手咁大既肉量+有時會加埋蛋

每日食120g左右

Gym 3日一個loop，99%係收工就去做，做完就食晚餐
做胸同做背都係4個4組大肌肉動作+2/3個4組細肌肉動作 最後個組dropset 推同拉既動作為主 之後20-30分鐘帶氧
膊腳同一日 4-5個4組膊動作 腳做3組大重量squat/legpress 再加4組leg extension同leg curl

我只係求突破平台期

My friend Jo is a gym membership saleswoman who will be sending a follow-up email and making a follow-up call to a customer who's interested in joining the ten year membership. I used to work in a gym and whenever a customer paid a visit to the gym I always followed it up with an email or a call. Some of my colleagues followed it up with a visit to the customer. My friend John is interested in joining her gym. He had a meeting yesterday and a follow-up has been scheduled for tomorrow. He's also writing a sequel to the acclaimed "the invisible man" so he's so busy that he won't have time to pay a follow-up visit to the gym. Therefore I handed him the membership agreement for Jo and will follow up with him in the next few days. The membrtshuo costs eight hundred dollars a month which is well worth it for the broad range of facilities you can use. They sell a tub of whey protein for five hundred dollars which is worth it as its normally two times more expensive. The cost of a tub of casein protein has edged up by five dollars while that of soy protein has edged lower by six dollars. The cost of creatine has edged down to two hundred dollars whereas that of nitric oxide has edged higher from five hundred to five hundred and ten dollars. Last saturday john complained that he was treated badly at Starbucks. As a result a barista provided a referral to a senior staff member who in turn referred his case to the manager. He'll follow the case up with the manager to be sure that it'll be dealt with seriously. In addition hes been suffering from a stroke so I gave him a referral to a cardiologist. Recently he posted on an online forum and suggested building an art gallery so as to boost tourism which was supported by many people on the forum. They asked the forum administrator for a referral to a district councilor. They'll follow up the matter being discussed with the district councilor. I'll follow the issue up too. His suggestions for the city's future and the citizens are deemed appropriate. The other week Jo and I went to a museum where we looked at every big nineteenth-century oil painting in minute detail so as not to miss any wonderful things. She'll be giving a birthday party next Sunday in Rosewood hotel instead of at home so as not to disturb her neighbouring homeowners. She was late because she got off at the wrong stop and had to wait for another train. I asked "how on earth did you miss your stop?" She said "I'm sorry. What can I say?" I complimented on her bassoon skills. She said "yes what can I say?" The current situation is very bad. I then said "well yes what can I say?"
